items.title: Penalties Can Be Cruel. How Will The USA Approach Them?

items.title: Williams edged by Joint in epic three‑setter on singles return
items.summary: Serena Williams came close to a sensational comeback win on her Wimbledon return before narrowly losing an epic three-setter to Maya Joint 3-6 7-6 (8-6) 3-6 at Wimbledon 2026
